name: Section 148 Reopening Notice Analysis
description: Extracts key data from Income Tax Section 148 reopening notices for drafting a formal reply.

checks.focus: Extract the assessment year being reopened and reasons recorded
checks.rule: Identify the assessment year being reopened and the specific reasons to believe that income has escaped assessment.

checks.focus: Identify the escaped income amount and nature
checks.rule: Extract the amount of income alleged to have escaped assessment and its nature (capital gains, unexplained credits, etc.).

checks.focus: Extract taxpayer PAN, name, and jurisdictional AO details
checks.rule: Extract PAN, taxpayer name, and the Assessing Officer's designation and jurisdiction.

checks.focus: Check if notice is within time limitation under Section 149
checks.rule: Verify whether the notice has been issued within the time limits prescribed under Section 149(1). Extract issue date and relevant AY.

checks.focus: Extract response deadline and required documents
checks.rule: Identify the deadline to file return in response and any specific documents or information sought.
